question: The scatter plot shows daily screen time vs. sleep. Which statement best describes the relationship between screen time and sleep according to the chart?

options.A: People who spend more time on screens tend to get more sleep.
options.B: People who spend more time on screens tend to get less sleep.
options.C: There is no clear relationship between screen time and sleep.
options.D: Only the largest, darkest points show any relationship between screen time and sleep.

explanation: This scatter plot uses dual encoding: point position shows the relationship, but point size and color also encode the x-variable, making high values overly salient. That can tempt viewers to overstate the strength or form of the relationship.
